title: No Glow Lichen
description: Remove light from glow liches entirely. It was annoying for me in caves to see them, they ruin the dark atmosphere of caves and are unrealistic.
body:
No more light from Glow Lichen. 

I was annoyed to see theese things in caves because they emit light that is unrealistic in caves and overall ruins the dark atmosphere of caves. Tried methods like shader options and resourcepacks to stop it from emiting light, but it didn't work, so I came up with a solution. With a little bit of trouble I created this extremely lightweight mod.
